content: what's a good gdoll team that doesn't have Lily?

the team I use now is full Caro with G Helot, helot, Aigis, and Thais

also, is their a better way to send my roster?
you dont really have a good dps for a second team
the main team youre using is optimal tho
ghelot thais aigis helot is a teamcomp thats ran even for the hardest content in the game
you could be looking to pick up kath from the current banner and make a team with her but she needs minimum e3 to function well
if you do wanna just try out something different with the characters you have rn you could run nymph, gdoll, agrippa, salvador as a soft starting poison comp
unfortunately bro, you have no teams
you wasted too much pulls

its still early, many pulls to come
and aigis

You should read game mechanics first
Then cheri handbool
Cheri handbook is your bible
It makes ur early much easier
just messing around
quick explanation on damage amp and if its worth it on a covenant?

Increase base samage of everyone.

Generally no except specific builds
Where are you in the game rn
Almost done with Arc 2, I'm trying to optimize covenants. Someone just told me it's better to go crit dmg than amp unless its someone like kath
Icic
Rolling with mouchette too 🙂
For kath specifically, you might want dmg amp on your supports. It's a team wide stat anw
Mouchette you would prefer DR or keyflare on your support
I've got burial grounds on my sups and I am trying to max dr. For Mouchette is dr still a good substat or do you go crit?
Mouchette specifically still wants crit. DR is an acceptable sub stats on her
Would you reroll a lvl 8 of a substat you don't want?
It hurts but you have to lol. Every time you hit aliemus regel level when your rolling your dps pieces.

Only if no other units need it.

Or if om lazy.

For you, don't hyper invest in cov while you're new
Yeah, its been a huge resource sink for me recently. I don't really spend scrip on anything else tho
Ueah dont bother
I didn't bother with it
1 good stat and ignore for now
Good to know. Thanks for the help!

Heya, doing my first D-Dives and I'd like to make two more teams (3 if possible, but I probably don't have the resources for that many units)
This is my box, and two teams already set up. Any advice for the other two? I'd like to use Daffodil if possible to make me feel better about getting her twice lol. I'll figure out the wheels later I know they aren't good.
You can definitely clear at least alert 1, you only need to level 2 dps

here is what i would do

1. Daff casiah aigis winkle

2. Sorel thais leigh caecus

3. Sanga doll ramona + support vortice
this should do 3x a3 easily
the support might do a4
assuming they are all lv60 like in your pic
oh, u will need to put minimally soulforge level 1 on each character u are using

Oh they def aren't lol, I forgot to change them, most of them are level one. But! That's ok I'm pretty flushed with EXP and A1 just requires level 40 right? Seems doable. I really appreciate the teams, very helpful.
Oh cool, very good to know.
But yeah a1 is pretty easy, u can steamroll it with like a lv50 sorel and daff
let me know if u have questions on how to play those comps, it should be fairly straightforward though
also dont play sorel into w2
the boss will hard counter her
What E should I get for Salvador? Also what should I put on him?

Team idea.
Sanga, Kathigu-Ra, Ramona and for 4th slot it can be any good shield generator.

the classic oe sanga team is sanga miryam winkle horla

if u are worried about shield
